title: Nyemo Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Nyemo, with a Z-Score of -3.14. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Nyemo are characterized by a significant drop in temperature, with a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 12.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 83%, and the wind speed is relatively low at 4.0 km/h. 
 The absence of Cooling Degree Days (CDD) indicates that the cold snap is the dominant weather feature, with no warmth expected in the near future.
